data.title: Talkpool resolves on a directed share issue of EUR 1.65 million to a group of strategic investors led by Applied Invest Nordics
data.description: In CHUR, Switzerland, on March 27, 2026, the Board of Directors of Talkpool AG announced a decision to conduct a new share issue based on approval received during the Annual General Meeting held on September 15, 2025. This initiative deviates from previous protocols and indicates a significant strategic move by the company.

data.title: NIQ Redefines Packaging Intelligence with Monthly, Harmonized Global Performance Visibility
data.description: NielsenIQ, a prominent player in consumer intelligence, has introduced the Packaging Strategic Planner Global (SPG) Solution. This innovative platform, which is the first of its kind worldwide, provides monthly insights into packaging performance, covering various aspects such as materials, formats, and pack configurations. In today's rapidly evolving landscape of packaging innovation, companies often make decisions based on outdated or incomplete data. The Packaging SPG Solution aims to address this issue by offering continuous updates on packaging trends and performance metrics, enabling organizations to make informed decisions in a timely manner.

data.title: Li Auto Inc. Announces Put Right Notification for 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028
data.description: Li Auto Inc., a key player in China's new energy vehicle sector, has announced a notification for holders of its 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028 (CUSIP No. 50202M AB8). According to the disclosure made on March 27, 2026, each holder has the option, as per the Indenture dated April 12, 2021, to demand the Company to buy back all or a portion of their Notes amounting to US$1,000 principal sum (or its multiples) for cash on May 1, 2026. This Put Right opportunity will lapse at 5:00 p.m., New York City time, on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Li Auto is listed on Nasdaq with the symbol LI and on HKEX with the code 2015.

data.title: Global Agricultural Drones Market to Reach USD 23.1 Billion by 2032, Driven by Precision Farming and AI-Enabled Crop Intelligence | Vyansa Intelligence
data.description: Today, in New Delhi on March 27, 2026, it has been reported that the Global Agricultural Drones Market is expected to see significant growth in the coming years. A recent market study by Vyansa Intelligence indicates that the market is projected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 21.89% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is attributed to the swift uptake of agricultural drone technology in farming practices globally.
